question:
Given the following premises:

Sam is doing a project.
A project is written either in C++ or Python.
If Sam does a project written in Python, he will not use a Mac.
Sam is using a Mac.
If Sam uses a Mac, he will play a song.
If a song is not titled "Perfect," Sam will never play it.

Assuming all premises are true, is the following statement true or false?

Statement: The project Sam is doing is written in C++.
error: Failed after 3 attempts. Last error: Error evaluating expression 'does_project(sam, p) and project_language(p) == cpp': Symbolic expressions cannot be cast to concrete Boolean values.
